title: Calculus — Derivatives
description: Chain/product rules, common derivatives table, and a short solve flowchart.

blocks.title: Common derivatives
blocks.markdown:
| f | f' |
|---|----|
| x^n | n x^{n-1} |
| e^x | e^x |
| \ln x | 1/x |
| \sin x | \cos x |
| \cos x | -\sin x |

blocks.title: Differentiate workflow
blocks.mermaid:
flowchart TD
  A[Identify f] --> B{Product / chain / quotient?}
  B -->|Chain| C[Inner then outer]
  B -->|Product| D[u'v + uv']
  B -->|Quotient| E[(u'v-uv')/v^2]
  C --> F[Simplify]
  D --> F
  E --> F
